title: Research Papers in Economics
body: Research Papers in Economics (RePEc) is a collaborative effort of hundreds of volunteers in many countries to enhance the dissemination of research in economics. The heart of the project is a decentralized database of working papers, preprints, journal articles, and software components. The project started in 1997. Its precursor NetEc dates back to 1993.
categories: Articles lacking reliable references from November 2012
Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis data services
